heading: Usage
body:
```python
from pymongo import MongoClient
from langchain_mongodb.docstores import MongoDBDocStore

# Replace with your MongoDB connection string and namespace
connection_string = "<connection-string>"
namespace = "<database-name>.<collection-name>"

# Initialize the MongoDBDocStore
docstore = MongoDBDocStore.from_connection_string(connection_string, namespace)
```

> **Note:** 
>
> - [API Reference](https://langchain-mongodb.readthedocs.io/en/latest/langchain_mongodb/docstores/langchain_mongodb.docstores.MongoDBDocStore.html#langchain_mongodb.docstores.MongoDBDocStore)
